# Project State — Marine Guardian Command Center

# Updated: 2026-05-25 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 main-session orchestrator + Opus subagent executors via superpowers:subagent-driven-development; Map Preview shipped)

PHASE:        Map Preview shipped — Area Boundary Management UI follow-on (DEFERRED bucket item 1 of 3 cleared).
              First of three DEFERRED items from the 2026-05-23 Locked Task Queue is now in production on /patrol-areas.
              Read-only Leaflet dialog opens from a new Preview button in the Patrol Areas table Actions column.
              Esri World Imagery satellite base layer; auto-fit to boundary on open; scroll-wheel zoom enabled;
              malformed-geometry fallback message rather than crash. SSR-safe via next/dynamic + ssr:false on the
              Leaflet island. feat/area-boundary-map-preview squash-merged + branch deleted.

              SOURCE CHANGES (5 NEW + 3 MODIFIED — 6 implementation commits squashed):
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/lib/geojson-to-leaflet-positions.ts NEW — Pure helper. Accepts Polygon and LineString GeoJSON geometries (matches Prisma GeometryType enum), validates coordinates shape, flips [lng,lat]→[lat,lng] for Leaflet, returns { kind: "Polygon", positions: [number,number][][] } for Polygon, { kind: "LineString", positions: [number,number][] } for LineString, or null for invalid/unsupported input. No deps on Leaflet runtime (returns plain tuple arrays). Colocated under the patrol-areas feature per CLAUDE.md anti-premature-abstraction.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/lib/__tests__/geojson-to-leaflet-positions.test.ts NEW — Pure-function vitest coverage, 8 cases: Polygon flip, LineString flip, expectedType mismatch, LineString with <2 points, Polygon outer ring with <4 points, missing coordinates field, non-finite coordinate values, non-object input (null/string/undefined).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-map.tsx NEW — Leaflet island. "use client" Client Component, designed for dynamic import with ssr:false because Leaflet imports `window` at module-load. MapContainer + TileLayer (Esri World Imagery satellite tiles) + Polygon/Polyline overlay layer + AutoFitBounds inner component that calls map.fitBounds on mount/update with 16px padding. Scroll-wheel zoom enabled for funder review use. Renders nothing when geojsonToLeafletPositions returns null (parent dialog catches that case and shows fallback copy).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/preview-area-boundary-dialog.tsx NEW — shadcn Dialog wrapper. Dynamic-imports AreaBoundaryMap with ssr:false to keep the parent page SSR-safe. Renders the AreaBoundary name + region in the dialog header. Mounts AreaBoundaryMap in dialog body when boundary != null. Gracefully renders an emerald "Map cannot be displayed — geometry is malformed" fallback paragraph when geojsonToLeafletPositions returns null instead of crashing the dialog. Close button uses data-testid="preview-close" to disambiguate from shadcn Dialog's sr-only Close button (matches A.1/A.2 dialog convention).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/preview-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx NEW — jsdom vitest. Mocks `area-boundary-map.tsx` to a stub `({boundary}) => <div data-testid="map-mock">{boundary.name}</div>` since vitest jsdom cannot render Leaflet canvas. Covers: dialog header renders the boundary name + region; dialog body renders the map mock when boundary present; malformed-geometry path renders the inline fallback paragraph; Close button calls onOpenChange(false). afterEach(cleanup) prevents Radix portal accumulation across cases — matches the existing edit-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx convention.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-table.tsx EDITED — added `onPreview: (boundary: AreaBoundaryRow) => void` prop alongside existing onEdit/onDelete. Added Preview button to the Actions column BEFORE Edit + Delete buttons, role-gated by isAdmin like the others.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/area-boundary-table.test.tsx EDITED — added onPreview prop to all renders to satisfy required-prop typecheck. Added "calls onPreview with the row's boundary when Preview is clicked" test case mirroring the existing onEdit/onDelete callback tests. Net delta: +1 test case.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/page.tsx EDITED — added `previewTarget: AreaBoundaryRow | null` state mirroring deleteTarget/editTarget pattern. Mounts PreviewAreaBoundaryDialog at root level with open={previewTarget != null} + onOpenChange clearing previewTarget. Passes onPreview={setPreviewTarget} to AreaBoundaryTable.

              VALIDATION:
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web typecheck: clean (zero errors).
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web lint: clean (zero errors, --max-warnings 0). One inline deviation from plan: removed `LatLngBoundsExpression` cast in area-boundary-map.tsx because react-leaflet 5's types already accept `[number, number][]` (rule no-unnecessary-type-assertion flagged the cast).
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web test: 535/535 passing across 58 files. Baseline 518 → +17 (1 onPreview table test + 8 helper cases + 8 dialog cases). Matches predicted total exactly.
              - Cross-package regression: jobs 122/122, storage 15/15, shared 154/154 — all clean, no breakage.
              - Manual visual QA: SKIPPED in dispatch — subagent has no browser access. Recommended human follow-up: open /patrol-areas as admin, click Preview on a real boundary, verify satellite imagery tiles load + polygon outline renders + scroll-wheel zoom works + Close button dismisses dialog cleanly.

              IMPLEMENTATION DEVIATIONS FROM PLAN (all accepted):
              1. Removed `LatLngBoundsExpression` cast in area-boundary-map.tsx — react-leaflet 5 types already accept `[number, number][]`; lint rule no-unnecessary-type-assertion flagged the cast as redundant.
              2. Substituted `toBeInTheDocument` with `toBeTruthy`/`toBeNull` in dialog test — project doesn't have @testing-library/jest-dom setup wired into vitest, matching the existing A.1/A.2 dialog test conventions.
              3. Added `afterEach(cleanup)` to the preview dialog test — prevents Radix portal accumulation across test cases (matches the convention already established in edit-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx).
